chapter1.title: The Farm and the Brave Sister
chapter1.discussionQuestion: How does staying near safe people make us feel?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I stayed near safe people ?
I spoke clearly when I felt unsafe ?
I followed the rules while playing ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I raise my hand and speak when I need anything ?
I stay within classroom rules ?
I respect my teacher's instructions ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I told my parents about a fear ?
I practiced saying 'No' politely ?
I thanked Allah for keeping me safe ?

chapter2.title: The Giant Burger
chapter2.discussionQuestion: How did I show good manners while talking today?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I waited before speaking ?
I used polite words ?
I helped after meals ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I wait for my turn before speaking ?
I use polite words in class ?
I listen quietly when others speak ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I helped with a household task ?
I listened to the elders ?
I said Bismillah and Alhamdulillah ?

chapter3.title: Goodbyes and New Beginnings
chapter3.discussionQuestion: Why is it important to have good manners when entering a new house?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I said Salam when entering ?
I helped unpack my things ?
I kept my room tidy ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I welcomed a new student ?
I shared my things gracefully ?
I listened to the teacher attentively ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I respected my older siblings ?
I didn't complain about the move ?
I appreciated my parents' hard work ?

chapter1.title: The First Flight
chapter1.discussionQuestion: Why is honesty always the best choice, even when we make a mistake?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I told the truth today even if it was hard ?
I didn't hide my mistakes ?
I learned from something I did wrong ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I was honest about my homework ?
I didn't take things that don't belong to me ?
I apologized properly when I made a mistake ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I told the truth to my parents ?
I didn't blame my siblings for my mistakes ?
I asked Allah to help me be honest ?

chapter2.title: The Best Answer
chapter2.discussionQuestion: How does seeking knowledge and giving wise answers please Allah?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I tried to learn something new today ?
I thought carefully before answering a question ?
I shared good knowledge with my friends ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I paid close attention to the lesson ?
I answered politely when asked ?
I didn't interrupt others while they spoke ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I shared what I learned with my family ?
I respected my older siblings' knowledge ?
I asked questions when I didn't understand ?

chapter3.title: A Surprise Visit
chapter3.discussionQuestion: How should we behave when guests visit our home?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I smiled and welcomed someone today ?
I offered water or food to a guest ?
I practiced good manners (Saying Salam) ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I welcomed a visitor to our class ?
I offered my seat or help ?
I remained quiet and respectful ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I helped my parents serve the guests ?
I didn't make noise while guests were talking ?
I said goodbye nicely when they left ?

chapter1.title: The Meaning of Patience
chapter1.discussionQuestion: Why is being patient important even when things are difficult?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I stayed calm when things didn't go my way ?
I didn't rush or complain during a hard task ?
I waited nicely for my turn ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I listened quietly when the teacher was busy ?
I was patient during challenging lessons ?
I helped a classmate without getting frustrated ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I was patient when my parents asked me to wait ?
I handled disagreement with my siblings calmly ?
I remembered Allah helps the patient ?

chapter2.title: A Caring Heart
chapter2.discussionQuestion: How does helping others make our own hearts feel better?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I offered a smile to someone who seemed sad ?
I shared something I value with a friend ?
I said a kind word to someone today ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I noticed someone struggling and offered help ?
I included everyone in the group activity ?
I said 'please' and 'thank you' sincerely ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I asked my parents how their day was ?
I comforted a sibling who was upset ?
I made dua for my family's well-being ?

chapter3.title: Standing for Truth
chapter3.discussionQuestion: Why does speaking the truth require courage?

sections.heading: My Daily Actions:
questions: I stood up for what is right today ?
I didn't agree with a wrong action ?
I admitted fault immediately ?

sections.heading: Ethics in Class:
questions: I was honest even when it could have gotten me in trouble ?
I didn't let others cheat or copy ?
I reported an incident fairly ?

sections.heading: With My Family:
questions: I told the complete truth to my parents ?
I supported truth over taking sides ?
I sought forgiveness from Allah for past lies ?
